components.name: Annotation
components.blurb: Inline cited term — the primary citation apparatus; renders as marginalia without breaking prose.
components.props: term, note

components.name: Chart
components.blurb: Declarative line/bar/area/dot chart (Observable Plot). Reach for it for a trend, comparison, or relationship.
components.props: mark: line|bar|area|dot, x, y, data[], series?, height?, caption?

components.name: Timeline
components.blurb: Horizontal SVG timeline of dated events. Reach for it to anchor chronology or a consequence arc.
components.props: events: { date, label, detail }[], caption?

components.name: DataTable
components.blurb: Sortable/filterable table, optional summed footer (BOM totals). Reach for it for the structured detail a chart can't hold.
components.props: columns: { key, label, type, align? }[], rows[], total?, caption?

components.name: Scrolly
components.blurb: Sticky-graphic, stepped-prose scrollytelling shell. Reach for it for the single climactic sequence.
components.props: caption?; children are <ScrollyStep> blocks

components.name: ScrollyStep
components.blurb: One step of a <Scrolly> sequence: a pinned graphic + prose that scrolls past it.
components.props: graphic: JSX (usually <Chart>/<Map>/<Timeline>); children = step prose

components.name: ScrollyTimeline
components.blurb: A scroll/drag-driven playhead walking a long dated arc, each stop with its own prose panel. Reach for it for a long chronology with a distinct beat per date.
components.props: events: { date, label, detail, prose }[], caption?

components.name: RunnableCode
components.blurb: Editable, runnable JS sandbox (CodeMirror + worker). Reach for it at the moment of confusion, when running beats describing.
components.props: code: JS template-literal string, caption?, timeoutMs? (default 2000)

components.name: Map
components.blurb: World/regional choropleth (ISO3 keys). Reach for it to situate the geography before the narrative deepens.
components.props: values: Record<iso3, number>, labels?: Record<iso3, string>, caption?

components.name: ControlledChart
components.blurb: Reader-controlled decay-curve instrument (a slider recomputes the curve live) — the bespoke predecessor to ParameterPlay. Reach for it for a cost/decay argument the reader should steer.
components.props: start?, floor?, rate?, span?, threshold?, unit?, caption?

components.name: KellyChart
components.blurb: Reader-controlled Kelly-criterion growth-rate curve — two sliders (win probability, payoff odds) recompute f* live. Reach for it for a betting/sizing argument.
components.props: p?, b?, caption?

components.name: Model3D
components.blurb: The RARE inline 3D viewer (drag-to-rotate). ONE per article max, only when the subject is genuinely spatial — a printed part or physical mechanism.
components.props: src? (committed .glb from getImage-style pipeline), alt?, label?, detail?, caption?

components.name: Sidenote
components.blurb: Margin aside / numbered footnote — the everyday marginalia primitive. Reach for it for a caveat or aside that would clutter the line.
components.props: n, href?, source?; children = the note body

components.name: DrawChart
components.blurb: Draw-on-scroll line chart; each stroke draws itself as the figure enters the viewport. Reach for it for a trajectory that should feel drawn, not static.
components.props: series: { id, label, points: {x,y}[] }[] (or single data[]), logY?, xLabel?, yLabel?, duration?, caption?

components.name: StatBand
components.blurb: Dramatic figure row that counts up on scroll-in. Earn it when scale/rate/delta genuinely IS the lede.
components.props: stats: { value, prefix?, suffix?, decimals?, group?, label, sub?, href? }[], caption?, duration?

components.name: Pullquote
components.blurb: Static, dramatic primary-source block (quote/document/telegram/headline). Earn it only when the verbatim original beats paraphrase.
components.props: cite?, href?, kind?: quote|document|telegram|headline; children = quote text

components.name: Figure
components.blurb: The image primitive — local, committed, build-optimized asset with caption/credit/sourceUrl. Reach for it wherever the subject is genuinely visual.
components.props: src: ImageMetadata (imported), alt, caption?, credit?, sourceUrl?, zoom?, bleed?, aspect?

components.name: Math
components.blurb: Display equation / numbered derivation (KaTeX). Reach for it instead of spelling math out in prose.
components.props: tex, steps?: { tex, note? }[], label?, caption?, numbered?

components.name: Callout
components.blurb: Boxed key-insight/warning/note, single left hairline. Reach for it to set apart the one line that must not be missed.
components.props: kind: note|warning|key-insight|aside|caution, title?; children = note body

components.name: Detail
components.blurb: Progressive-disclosure "go deeper" block (native <details>, zero JS). Reach for it to add depth without bloating the linear read.
components.props: summary, defaultOpen?; children = expandable body

components.name: Definition
components.blurb: Glossary tooltip that TEACHES a term (vs Annotation, which cites). Reach for it the first time a term of art appears.
components.props: term, def, children? (rich popover body)

components.name: Diagram
components.blurb: Node-edge architecture/flow figure. The core primitive for showing how the parts of a system connect.
components.props: nodes: { id, label, x, y, kind? }[], edges: { from, to, label?, kind? }[], caption?, highlightOnHover?

components.name: Simulation
components.blurb: Interactive canvas sandbox with reader sliders (built-in kernels: walk/sir/wave/life). Reach for it when the reader should tune parameters and watch.
components.props: kind: walk|sir|wave|life, params?: { key, label, min, max, default, step }[], caption?, height?

components.name: Stepper
components.blurb: Numbered step sequence, one step visible at a time. Reach for it for a "first this, then this" mechanism or build sequence.
components.props: steps: { title, body, figure? }[] (body/figure are HTML strings), mode?: reveal|tabs|all, caption?

components.name: Quiz
components.blurb: Check-your-understanding at the crux. Reach for it to make the reader commit to a prediction before the reveal.
components.props: questions: { prompt, choices?, answer, explain, kind? }[], caption?

components.name: CodeWalkthrough
components.blurb: Narrated, syntax-highlighted STATIC code where narration steps highlight line ranges. Complements RunnableCode for code too large/non-JS to run.
components.props: code: string, lang?, steps: { lines: [start,end], note }[], caption?

components.name: AnnotatedFigure
components.blurb: Numbered pins over an image — "here is what to look at." Reach for it when a photo rewards guided attention.
components.props: src (from getImage()), width, height, alt, caption?, credit?, sourceUrl?, pins: { x, y, label, note }[]

components.name: SmallMultiples
components.blurb: A grid of the same chart faceted by category (the Tufte staple). Reach for it when one pattern should hold or break across many series at once.
components.props: data[], mark: line|bar|area|dot, x, y, facet, columns?, sharedY?, caption?, height?

components.name: Distribution
components.blurb: Histogram/density with an optional threshold marker line. Reach for it when the spread or a cutoff — not the mean — is the point.
components.props: data[], value, bins?, marker?: { at, label }[], mark?: hist|density, caption?, valueLabel?, height?

components.name: Scatter
components.blurb: X/Y relationship with an optional linear fit. Reach for it to show a correlation and how tight it is.
components.props: data[], x, y, size?, color?, fit?: linear|none, caption?, xLabel?, yLabel?, height?

components.name: Slopegraph
components.blurb: Before/after ranking or value reordering across two columns. Reach for it when who moved past whom is the story.
components.props: data: { label, before, after }[], beforeLabel, afterLabel, caption?

components.name: RangePlot
components.blurb: Dot-plus-range (CI / min-max / IQR) by category — the honest alternative to bars-with-error-caps.
components.props: data: { label, low, mid, high, n? }[], caption?, unit?

components.name: CompareSlider
components.blurb: Before/after image or map wipe. Reach for it when the insight IS the difference between two states.
components.props: before, after (from getImage()), width, height, alt, beforeLabel?, afterLabel?, caption?, orientation?

components.name: CastGrid
components.blurb: Static cast-of-characters/commanders card grid. Reach for it when the reader must hold several named actors at once.
components.props: cast: { name, role, note, img?, sourceUrl? }[], caption?

components.name: EventCascade
components.blurb: Vertical causal chain (X → because → Y → therefore → Z), distinct from time-scaled Timeline. Reach for it for a chain of consequences.
components.props: nodes: { label, detail, kind?: cause|effect|turning-point }[], caption?

components.name: StateMachine
components.blurb: A token walked through states/transitions (a handshake, a parser, a protocol). Reach for it whenever the mechanism IS a set of states and transitions.
components.props: states: { id, label, x, y }[], transitions: { from, to, on }[], start, sequence?, caption?

components.name: LayerStack
components.blurb: An exploded/stacked layer view (OSI model, a rendering pipeline). Reach for it for any layered system where the layering is the point.
components.props: layers: { label, note, detail? }[], orientation?, caption?

components.name: Checklist
components.blurb: Interactive, persistent reproduce-this checklist the reader ticks off. Perfect for a closing "Reproduce this" section.
components.props: items: { label, note?, href? }[], title?, caption?

components.name: GanttStrip
components.blurb: A phase/timeline strip of bars. Reach for it to lay out build phases or a rollout over time.
components.props: tasks: { label, start, end, note? }[], unit?: day|hr, caption?

components.name: RouteMap
components.blurb: Map + great-circle routes/arcs/points. Reach for it for movement across geography — a march, a crossing, a supply line.
components.props: routes?: { from: [lng,lat], to: [lng,lat], label?, kind? }[], points?: { at, label }[], values?, labels?, caption?

components.name: Sankey
components.blurb: Flow/allocation diagram. Reach for it when the breakdown of a total is the point (budget, force strength, casualties).
components.props: nodes: { id, label? }[], links: { source, target, value }[] (DAG), unit?, caption?

components.name: BattleMap
components.blurb: Phase-by-phase tactical map over a committed base image, with a phase scrubber. Theater's spine — one phase per narrative beat.
components.props: src/width/height (from getImage()), alt, caption?, sides: { id, label, tone? }[], phases: PhaseSpec[]

components.name: OrderOfBattle
components.blurb: Static force-structure roster (sides → formations → units), expandable via native <details>. Reach for it for command/formation structure.
components.props: sides: { id, label, commander?, tone?, formations: Formation[] }[], caption?

components.name: ForceComparison
components.blurb: Head-to-head diverging-bar comparison of forces/casualties. Reach for it twice — the strength ratio going in, the butcher's bill coming out.
components.props: sides: { label, tone? }[], metrics: { label, values: number[], unit?, higherIsWorse? }[], caption?

components.name: ParameterPlay
components.blurb: N reader sliders bound to an author-supplied formula, live curve + readouts — the generalized reader-controlled model. Reach for it for a NEW tunable relationship a fixed component doesn't cover.
components.props: params: { key, label, min, max, default, step, unit? }[], expr, xRange, readouts?: { label, expr, unit? }[], caption?

components.name: PowerFlow
components.blurb: Government power-flow diagram: institutions in branch columns x tier rows, directed authority edges (appoints/dissolves/reviews/confidence...). Reach for it to show how a state's constitutional authority actually flows.
components.props: structure: GovernmentStructure (@khazana/core), caption?, highlightOnHover?

components.name: CrossFaceLink
components.blurb: Inline destination-colored ↗ tell that crosses INTO the other face (Study→Atlas or Atlas→Study) — a plain functional link, full cross-document navigation, quiet atmosphere-crossfade choreography, no client JS.
components.props: destination: "atlas" | "study", href
